description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a long, forward-mounted cannon. The exterior is covered in a mottled camouflage pattern of green, brown, and black, designed to break up its outline. The turret is centrally positioned and features a prominent barrel extending from the front, with what appears to be a hatch or viewport on the side. The hull is wide and flat, with thick, sloped armor plating visible on all sides, and the vehicle moves on continuous tracks rather than wheels. No visible windows or civilian features are present, emphasizing its military function. The overall design suggests a focus on protection, firepower, and battlefield survivability.
description: A large, camouflaged, tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon and thick, sloped armor plating. Its angular, low-profile design emphasizes protection and firepower.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, the sloped armor, and the continuous tracks along the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flat hull, the central cannon barrel, and the thick frontal armor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, and the angular, camouflaged body with visible hatch detail.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back armor, track ends, and the overall width of the vehicle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; turret and hull both appear heavily armored with no visible weak points.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland-style camouflage with irregular patches of green, brown, and black in a disruptive pattern.
